Release Gate: Block Submission History

Pool PR #73 adds durable submit outcome persistence. This release-stack branch keeps fresh installs and readiness checks aligned by requiring the block_submissions table before a package is considered deployment-ready.

Why

Without this gate, an upgraded pool binary could start cleanly, accept ASIC work, and then fail every attempt to persist submit outcome history because the table is missing. That would not stop mining, but it would destroy the evidence needed for A/B testing and incident reports.

Definition of Done

  • sql/pool-schema.sql creates block_submissions and its indexes for fresh installs.
  • release-readiness-check.py reports the table/columns missing before deployment.
  • Unit tests cover missing and present table states.
